svg.text: Register 0x65 = 0x08 → Genuine 192-line mode → 512B gap per bank
All operations performed during VBlank — no flicker, no tearing
If 80-byte row crosses 8K boundary, copy_row_wrapped splits it into two parts. Always exactly 160 bytes total.
